description_long: This object is a stylized representation of a horse, featuring a slender body, elongated legs, and a slightly angular head with upright ears. The surface is adorned with subtle, swirling patterns that add a decorative touch to the otherwise smooth exterior. The musculature and contours of the horse are simplified, giving it a somewhat abstract yet recognizable equine form. The tail is pointed and tapers downward, while the mane is short and closely follows the neck's curve. The overall posture suggests alertness, with the head held high and ears pricked forward. The object appears to be a solid, monochromatic sculpture, likely intended as an artistic or decorative piece in an urban environment.
description: A stylized, slender horse sculpture with subtle swirling patterns and a smooth, monochromatic surface, standing alert with upright ears.
description_view_0: The horse is seen from above, highlighting the narrow back, pointed tail, and symmetrical alignment of the body and legs.
description_view_1: A left side profile view shows the elongated legs, upright ears, and the decorative swirls on the body.
description_view_2: The front view emphasizes the horse's face, upright ears, and the symmetry of the legs and chest.
description_view_3: A right side profile view similar to the left, displaying the same stylized features and body contours.
attribute_pose: Standing square with head held high and ears pricked forward.
attribute_mane_style: Short and closely cropped along the neck.
attribute_leg_position: All four legs are straight and bearing weight evenly.
